2274000.name: Shells
2274000.description:
Shells is a geometry puzzle game about the elegance of nested pieces on a tiny board.

Slide your block into larger shells to rearrange the board and find your way out!

Features:

▪ Simple core mechanics and deep emergent complexity packed into a compact 4x4 grid. Train your brain by challenging your problem solving and spatial reasoning skills!

▪ Gradual difficulty curve featuring over 360 original levels spread across 8 distinct worlds.

▪ Flexible progression structure with multiple levels to choose from at any given point.

▪ Adjust the difficulty to your liking with the optional hint system!

▪ Soothing piano soundtrack accompanied by relaxing sound effects and backgrounds.
